_comment: Rosie MCP server for OpenAI Codex / codex-cli. Codex reads MCP servers from ~/.codex/config.json (or the project .codex/config.json) under the mcpServers key. Replace /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/rosie with your local rosie checkout. The server speaks the real MCP stdio JSON-RPC 2.0 transport (rev 2025-06-18).
